languages.text: {n}Ксеноморок развеивается, оставляя пустоту вместо мерцающего образа — и голос Себериана, который явно говорит уже какое-то время.{/n} "...пришло время отложить наши распри и обратить слаженные силы против общего врага. Патент династии должен вернуться на место — без него фон Валанциусы сгинут во мраке. Соглас{mf|ен|на} ли ты вместе встать против врага Человечества и династии?"

{n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"
languages.original_text: {n}Ксеноморок развеивается, оставляя пустоту вместо мерцающего образа — и голос Себериана, который явно говорит уже какое-то время.{/n} "...пришло время отложить наши распри и обратить слаженные силы против общего врага. Патент династии должен вернуться на место — без него фон Валанциусы сгинут во мраке. Соглас{mf|ен|на} ли ты вместе встать против врага Человечества и династии?"

The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and this dynasty?"

The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

languages.text: {n}那异形的幻象消散了，原本影像闪烁之处已是空空如也。与此同时，塞贝里安的声音重新变得清晰，他显然已经说了有一阵子了。{/n}“……是时候搁置我们的纷争，联合起来对抗共同的敌人了。王朝的贸易授状必须归位。若无此物，冯·瓦兰修斯家族必将在黑暗中覆灭。你愿意与我并肩作战，共同对抗人类与王朝之敌吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

traits.locale_text: {n}那异形的幻象消散了，原本影像闪烁之处已是空空如也。与此同时，塞贝里安的声音重新变得清晰，他显然已经说了有一阵子了。{/n}“……是时候搁置我们的纷争，联合起来对抗共同的敌人了。王朝的贸易授状必须归位。若无此物，冯·瓦兰修斯家族必将在黑暗中覆灭。你愿意与我并肩作战，共同对抗人类与王朝之敌吗？”

languages.text: {n}La imagen del xenos se desvanece, dejando solo aire donde estaba su imagen intermitente. Oyes la voz de Seberian, que claramente lleva un tiempo hablando.{/n} «... es hora de dejar a un lado nuestras rencillas y unir fuerzas contra un enemigo común. La Patente de la dinastía debe volver a su lugar. Sin ella, los von Valancius moriremos entre tinieblas. ¿Acepta colaborar conmigo contra los enemigos de la Humanidad y de la dinastía?».
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

traits.locale_text: {n}La imagen del xenos se desvanece, dejando solo aire donde estaba su imagen intermitente. Oyes la voz de Seberian, que claramente lleva un tiempo hablando.{/n} «... es hora de dejar a un lado nuestras rencillas y unir fuerzas contra un enemigo común. La Patente de la dinastía debe volver a su lugar. Sin ella, los von Valancius moriremos entre tinieblas. ¿Acepta colaborar conmigo contra los enemigos de la Humanidad y de la dinastía?».

languages.text: {n}L'apparition se dissipe, laissant un vide là où l'image vacillante du xénos se tenait un instant auparavant, et la voix de Seberian, qui de toute évidence parlait depuis un moment, se fait entendre.{/n} « ... il est temps d'oublier nos querelles et de faire front face à notre ennemi commun. La lettre de la dynastie doit retrouver sa juste place. Sans elle, les von Valancius retourneront à l'obscurité. Acceptez-vous de lutter ensemble contre les ennemis de la dynastie et de l'humanité ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

traits.locale_text: {n}L'apparition se dissipe, laissant un vide là où l'image vacillante du xénos se tenait un instant auparavant, et la voix de Seberian, qui de toute évidence parlait depuis un moment, se fait entendre.{/n} « ... il est temps d'oublier nos querelles et de faire front face à notre ennemi commun. La lettre de la dynastie doit retrouver sa juste place. Sans elle, les von Valancius retourneront à l'obscurité. Acceptez-vous de lutter ensemble contre les ennemis de la dynastie et de l'humanité ? »

languages.text: {n}Zeno görüntüsü dağılarak titreşen resmin durduğu yerde boş bir hava bırakıyor. Ardından da görünüşe göre bir süredir konuşan Seberian'ın sesi duyuluyor.{/n} "Kavgalarımızı bir kenara bırakmanın ve birleşik gücümüzü ortak düşmana çevirmenin zamanı geldi. Hanedanlık Ruhsatnamesi yerine konulmalı. O olmadan von Valanciuslar karanlıkta yok olup gidecektir. İnsanlığın ve hanedanlığın düşmanlarına karşı omuz omuza durmayı kabul ediyor musun?"
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Zeno görüntüsü dağılarak titreşen resmin durduğu yerde boş bir hava bırakıyor. Ardından da görünüşe göre bir süredir konuşan Seberian'ın sesi duyuluyor.{/n} "Kavgalarımızı bir kenara bırakmanın ve birleşik gücümüzü ortak düşmana çevirmenin zamanı geldi. Hanedanlık Ruhsatnamesi yerine konulmalı. O olmadan von Valanciuslar karanlıkta yok olup gidecektir. İnsanlığın ve hanedanlığın düşmanlarına karşı omuz omuza durmayı kabul ediyor musun?"

languages.text: {n}Als sich Projektion des Xenos in Wohlgefallen auflöst, hörst du die Stimme von Seberian, der schon seit einiger Zeit zu sprechen scheint.{/n} " ... wird es Zeit, unsere Meinungsverschiedenheiten beizulegen und unsere geballte Stärke gegen einen gemeinsamen Feind zu richten. Der Handelsbrief der Dynastie muss zurück an seinen Platz. Ohne ihn wird die Dynastie derer von Valancius in der Dunkelheit versinken. Seid Ihr bereit, den Feinden der Menschheit und der Dynastie gemeinsam entgegenzutreten?"
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Als sich Projektion des Xenos in Wohlgefallen auflöst, hörst du die Stimme von Seberian, der schon seit einiger Zeit zu sprechen scheint.{/n} " ... wird es Zeit, unsere Meinungsverschiedenheiten beizulegen und unsere geballte Stärke gegen einen gemeinsamen Feind zu richten. Der Handelsbrief der Dynastie muss zurück an seinen Platz. Ohne ihn wird die Dynastie derer von Valancius in der Dunkelheit versinken. Seid Ihr bereit, den Feinden der Menschheit und der Dynastie gemeinsam entgegenzutreten?"

languages.text: {n}異形の姿は消え、空虚な空間が揺らめく姿の跡に現れた。そして、その空虚な空間と共に、セベリアンの声が聞こえてくる。彼は明らかに長い間話していた。{/n}「...争いを脇に置いて、我々の力を一つにして、共通の敵に立ち向かう時が来た。王家の証書は、その本来の場所に置かれるべきだ。それがないと、フォン・ヴァランキウス家は闇に消えてしまう。人類と王家の敵に立ち向かうために、共に戦うことを誓うか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The apparition of the xenos dissipates, leaving empty air where the flickering image once stood, and with it the voice of Seberian, who has clearly been speaking for some time now, can be heard.{/n} "...it is time to set aside our quarrels and turn our united strength against a common enemy. The dynasty's Warrant must be restored to its place. Without it, the von Valancius will perish in the darkness. Do you agree to stand together against the enemies of Humanity and the dynasty?"
